issues.description: Action type 'SearchDeck' is incorrect. The effect allows you to look at and rearrange 5 cards from the top of your deck, not search/draw them to hand. This should use a custom action or clarify the mechanic as 'Rearrange' or similar, not SearchDeck which implies drawing cards.
Filter is missing critical specification: must target top 5 cards only, not 'Any' cards from deck. Should specify 'TopOfDeck' with count=5.
Destination 'hand' is wrong. Cards are rearranged at top or bottom of deck, they do not go to hand. Destination should be 'deck' or similar.
DSL is completely missing the [Blocker] keyword effect. The card has two distinct effects: Blocker (passive ability) and On Play effect. Only the On Play is represented.
